notes: France are close to full strength: Mbappe's minor ankle knock is not considered serious, Tchouameni returns from a two-game muscle absence with Deschamps expected to start him, while Kone (knee/fatigue), Saliba (back rest), and Upamecano (foot) are all expected to be passed fit. Spain's main doubts centre on Nico Williams (groin/adductor), who is available but unlikely to start, and Yeremy Pino (acromioclavicular sprain), who is fit but has missed three matches; De la Fuente otherwise has a…
